sections.paragraph:
Original: רגע

Transliteration: rega‛

Phonetic: reh'-gah

BDB Definition:

  1. a moment (noun masculine)
  2. for a moment, at one moment...at another moment (adverb)
  3. in a moment (with preposition)

Origin: from H7280 a wink (of the eyes), i.e. a very short space of time

TWOT entry: 2116a

Part(s) of speech:
